headline: Chipotle Weighs Softer Sales Against Aggressive Expansion And Valuation Concerns
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) is reporting declining same store sales and softer foot traffic as consumer spending weakens. Despite this pressure, the company is pressing ahead with plans to open hundreds of new restaurants across its footprint. The contrast between cooling in store performance and continued expansion is drawing attention from investors tracking Chipotle's long term ambitions. Chipotle Mexican Grill, trading at about $35.29 per share, is facing a tougher backdrop, with...
